compiled_state.title: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE in ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md (CP7)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Context

Story 12bf-521f: Wire PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE through all 7 interactive checkpoints in preplanning.

This task connects the existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED paths in `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md` to the PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag. CP7 covers this file.

## Dependencies

Requires T1 (241e-0fdf) and T2 (6af0-68c3) to be complete first.

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md

## Implementation

The file already contains INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED references at design confirmation, review, and approval steps (~lines 133, 228, 313). Wire these to PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE.

### Flag context

The PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE flag is read by SKILL.md at startup. The dispatch protocol receives it as part of the preplanning execution context.

### CP7 - UI designer confirmation/review/approval steps

At each of the 3 INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED locations, add an explicit conditional:

- If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=true (default): follow the existing interactive path
- If PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=false: use the existing INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED path

## Acceptance Criteria
- ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md has explicit PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE checks at each INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED location
- test_cp7_ui_designer_interactivity_deferred in 241e-0fdf test file passes GREEN
- Interactive path unchanged when PREPLANNING_INTERACTIVE=true
